values.value:
== TRANSLATION XML FORMAT == There are TWO types of translation files:
-- TYPE 1: Custom Label Translation -- File path: translations/{language}.translation metadataType: Translations memberName: {language} — MUST be the base language code ONLY (e.g. fr, de, ja, es, it, nl) CRITICAL: NEVER use locale variants like fr_FR, de_DE, es_ES — Salesforce rejects them with "bad value for restricted picklist field" Valid examples: fr (not fr_FR), de (not de_DE), es (not es_ES), pt_BR (this compound code IS valid) <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <Translations xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata"> <customLabels> <label>Translated text here</label> <name>Label_API_Name</name> </customLabels> </Translations> RULE: Multiple label translations for same language = ONE file with multiple <customLabels> blocks
-- TYPE 2: Object Translation (fields, picklist values, validation rules, object label) -- File path: objectTranslations/{ObjectName}-{language}.objectTranslation metadataType: CustomObjectTranslation memberName: {ObjectName}-{language} (e.g. Car__c-fr) <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <CustomObjectTranslation xmlns="http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata"> <!-- Object label translation (optional) --> <nameFieldLabel>Translated object name</nameFieldLabel> <!-- Field label translation --> <fields> <name>FieldName__c</name> <label>Translated field label</label> </fields> <!-- Picklist value translation --> <fields> <name>PicklistField__c</name> <picklistValues> <masterLabel>Original English Value</masterLabel> <translation>Translated Value</translation> </picklistValues> </fields> <!-- Validation rule error message translation --> <validationRules> <errorMessage>Translated error message</errorMessage> <name>RuleName</name> </validationRules> </CustomObjectTranslation> RULES: - Custom Label translations → translations/{lang}.translation (Translations type) - Field/Picklist/ValidationRule/Object translations → objectTranslations/{Object}-{lang}.objectTranslation (CustomObjectTranslation type) - Multiple fields for same object+language = ONE objectTranslation file with multiple <fields> blocks - nameFieldLabel is optional — only include if translating the object label itself - For DELETING a translation, use destructiveFiles with the appropriate type and member - Always include ALL existing translations from org state when updating — do not drop existing ones
Custom Label and Object Translation XML formats
